all_schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana

dbt_schemes.name: PAHAL
dbt_schemes.desc: Direct cooking gas subsidy to prevent leakage.

dbt_schemes.name: MGNREGS
dbt_schemes.desc: Rural manual labor employment guarantee outlays.

dbt_schemes.name: NSAP
dbt_schemes.desc: Direct pensions to elderly, widows, and disabled citizens.

dbt_schemes.name: SCHOLARSHIP
dbt_schemes.desc: Direct student grants and academic incentives.

dbt_schemes.name: PMAYG
dbt_schemes.desc: Financial assistance for rural housing construction.

dbt_schemes.name: PDS
dbt_schemes.desc: Subsidized and free food grains under PMGKAY (in-kind DBT).

dbt_schemes.name: FERTILIZER
dbt_schemes.desc: Direct fertilizer subsidies paid to manufacturers on behalf of farmers.

dbt_schemes.name: OTHERS
dbt_schemes.desc: State and minor central schemes combined.

cag_audit_logs.subject: Accounts of the Union Government for 2024-25

findings.title: Surrendered (Unspent) Allocations
findings.desc: Ministries failed to utilize their voted budgets and returned them to the Consolidated Fund at the end of FY.

findings.title: Excess Expenditure Without Voted Grants
findings.desc: Spent by three departments without initial parliamentary authorization, flagged for regularisation.

findings.title: Suspense Account Balance Outstanding
findings.desc: Transactions left unclassified due to missing bank reconciliations or documentation vouchers.

findings.title: Telecomm License Fees Short-payment
findings.desc: Undertaxation and underreporting of Adjusted Gross Revenue (AGR) by telecom operators.

findings.title: GST Inward Tax Credit Irregularities
findings.desc: Claims allowed on fake invoices or non-matching GSTR-2A entries in select central circles.
